evidence.reason: synthetic parser failure used to prove failed evidence receives no passing credit

findings.title: Synthetic credential-shaped test string
findings.reason: The fixture models detection and review routing without claiming a real credential or exploit.

findings.title: Synthetic outdated dependency advisory
findings.reason: The fixture models a dependency repair decision without claiming production exposure.

limitations: Semgrep evidence failed and receives no passing credit.
Synthetic findings do not prove production exposure or exploitability.

candidates.action: Remove the synthetic credential-shaped string and replace it with a non-secret fixture token.
verification: Confirm the synthetic finding ID is absent.
Confirm no unrelated fixture content changed.
candidates.rollback: Restore the fixture file from the exact pre-repair commit if verification fails.

candidates.action: Review a bounded dependency update in an isolated branch.
verification: Run dependency tests and the dependency scanner.
Confirm the advisory is resolved without introducing a new blocker.
candidates.rollback: Revert the isolated dependency change if tests or compatibility checks fail.

required_decisions: Validate that each finding is correctly interpreted.
Approve, revise, or reject each repair candidate.
Decide whether failed Semgrep evidence requires a rerun before delivery.

delivery.reason: The report includes synthetic risk findings, failed evidence, and unapproved repair candidates.
